ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the patient (M/F) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "insurance_id" INTEGER /* Insurance ID of the patient */,
  "primary_care_doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient's primary care doctor */,
  "date_of_death" TEXT /* Date of death for deceased patients */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  "clinic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clinic or hospital */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor */,
  "visit_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the visit */,
  "visit_notes" TEXT /* Notes and observations from the visit */,
  "discharge_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient was discharged */,
  "visit_type" TEXT /* Type of visit (e.g., inpatient, outpatient, emergency) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_visits_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_visits_clinic_id FOREIGN KEY ("clinic_id") REFERENCES clinics ("clinic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_visits_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clinics" (
  "clinic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clinic */,
  "clinic_name" TEXT /* Name of the clinic or hospital */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the clinic or hospital */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the clinic or hospital */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the clinic or hospital */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "specialties" TEXT /* Specialties offered by the clinic */,
  "bed_capacity" INTEGER /* Number of beds available at the clinic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clinic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "doctors" (
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each doctor */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the doctor */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the doctor */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the doctor */,
  "clinic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clinic or hospital where the doctor works */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the doctor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the doctor */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience for the doctor */,
  "languages_spoken" TEXT /* Languages spoken by the doctor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visit during which the test was conducted */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of the test (e.g., ECG, Blood Test) */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date of the test */,
  "test_results" TEXT /* Results of the test */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor who conducted the test */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes and observations */,
  "test_results_file" TEXT /* Test results file or attachment */,
  "test_status" TEXT /* Status of the test (e.g., pending, completed, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_tests_test_type FOREIGN KEY ("test_type") REFERENCES test_types ("test_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_tests_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_tests_visit_id FOREIGN KEY ("visit_id") REFERENCES patient_visits ("visit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_types" (
  "test_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test type */,
  "test_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the test type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test type */,
  "test_category" TEXT /* Category of the test (e.g., diagnostic, laboratory) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition or diagnosis */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date of the diagnosis */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the condition (e.g., Active, Resolved) */,
  "treatment_plan" TEXT /* Treatment plan for the condition */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor who made the diagnosis */,
  "condition_status_history" TEXT /* History of changes to the condition status */,
  "treatment_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_conditions_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_conditions_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medications" (
  "med_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication prescription */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "prescription_date" TEXT /* Date the medication was prescribed */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the medication */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the medication (e.g., daily, twice a day) */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor who prescribed the medication */,
  "medication_side_effects" TEXT /* Side effects of the medication */,
  "medication_interactions" TEXT /* Interactions between medications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("med_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "history_type" TEXT /* Type of the history (e.g., Previous Surgery, Family History) */,
  "history_date" TEXT /* Date of the history entry */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the history */,
  "history_category" TEXT /* Category of the history entry (e.g., surgical, medical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_history_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive, pending) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient whose record was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_reason" TEXT /* Reason for accessing the patient record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_vitals" (
  "vital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vital sign entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visit during which the vitals were taken */,
  "vital_date" TEXT /* Date when the vitals were recorded */,
  "blood_pressure" TEXT /* Blood pressure (systolic/diastolic) */,
  "heart_rate" INTEGER /* Heart rate in beats per minute */,
  "respiratory_rate" INTEGER /* Respiratory rate in breaths per minute */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "oxygen_saturation" REAL /* Oxygen saturation in percentage */,
  "vital_status" TEXT /* Status of the vitals (e.g., normal, abnormal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_vitals_visit_id FOREIGN KEY ("visit_id") REFERENCES patient_visits ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_vitals_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_symptoms" (
  "symptom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each symptom entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visit during which the symptom was reported */,
  "symptom_date" TEXT /* Date when the symptom was reported */,
  "symptom_name" TEXT /* Name of the symptom */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the symptom (e.g., mild, moderate, severe) */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the symptom */,
  "symptom_status" TEXT /* Status of the symptom (e.g., resolved, ongoing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symptom_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_symptoms_visit_id FOREIGN KEY ("visit_id") REFERENCES patient_visits ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_symptoms_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_allergies" (
  "allergy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each allergy entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "allergy_name" TEXT /* Name of the allergy */,
  "allergy_type" TEXT /* Type of the allergy (e.g., food, medication) */,
  "reaction" TEXT /* Reaction to the allergen */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the allergy (e.g., mild, moderate, severe) */,
  "allergy_severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the allergy (e.g., low, moderate, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allergy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_allergies_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_risk_factors" (
  "risk_factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk factor entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "risk_factor_name" TEXT /* Name of the risk factor (e.g., smoking, high blood pressure) */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date when the risk factor was assessed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the risk factor (e.g., present, absent) */,
  "risk_factor_severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the risk factor (e.g., low, moderate, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_risk_factors_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
